data.title: University of Phoenix introduces a cybersecurity pathway for working adults, emphasizing EC-Council competencies, allowing learners to showcase practical skills.
data.description: Today, the University of Phoenix introduced a new cybersecurity pathway tailored for adult professionals seeking career-focused training. This program consists of micro-credentials centered around practical skills, catering to those in the cybersecurity field. The pathway acknowledges the completion of specific University of Phoenix courses and validates skills aligned with EC-Council competency areas. This helps individuals showcase their abilities rather than just course completion. This initiative is part of the University's collaboration with an educational alliance.

data.title: Hydro One (TSX: H) to release Q3 2025 results on Nov 13 before markets open. Teleconference set for 8am ET.
data.description: Leading electric transmission and distribution utility in Ontario, Hydro One Limited (TSX: H), has announced it will host an investment community teleconference on November 13, 2025, at 8 a.m. ET. The company is set to disclose its third-quarter financial results on the morning of the same day.
OIL EXTENDS DECLINES IN POST-SETTLE TRADING ON CHINA TARIFFS

data.title: Military Veteran & Author Benjamin N. Carrasquillo challenges interpretations of ancient Yisra'elite in new Bible study.
data.description: Woodbridge, VA - On October 10, 2025, Benjamin N. Carrasquillo, a military veteran and author, presented a thought-provoking challenge to current interpretations of scripture. He highlighted the prevalent feeling among believers and non-believers alike that there may be deeper meanings hidden within the text. Carrasquillo's remarks generated significant interest among the public and sparked discussions surrounding the topic of biblical interpretation.

data.title: Acadian Timber Corp to release 2025 Q3 results on Oct 29, followed by conference call on Oct 30 at 1:00 p.m. ET. Website: www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information
data.description: Acadian Timber Corp, based in Edmundston, New Brunswick, is set to unveil its 2025 third quarter results on October 29, 2025, post-market closure. Interested parties can access the report on the company's website at www.acadiantimber.com/financial-information/. To delve deeper into the financial and operational performance, a conference call and webcast have been scheduled for October 30, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time, where senior management will elaborate on the results.

data.title: RAM Enterprise, Inc. partners with Vayeron Pty Ltd for smart conveyor monitoring technology - Oct. 10, 2025.
data.description: In Elko, Nevada, on October 10, 2025, RAM Enterprise, Inc., a prominent provider of conveyor and maintenance solutions, revealed a new collaboration with Vayeron Pty Ltd, a top producer of intelligent conveyor monitoring technology. This partnership marks a significant move in the industry as it brings together the expertise of RAM Enterprise and the innovative technology of Vayeron. The partnership is expected to enhance conveyor operations and maintenance efficiencies, benefiting numerous industries.

data.title: Lanvin Group's CFO David Chan steps down on Oct. 27, 2025, as announced in Shanghai; big change for luxury fashion group.
data.description: In Shanghai on October 10, 2025, Lanvin Group (NYSE: LANV), a renowned luxury fashion group, disclosed that Mr. David Chan, their Executive President and Chief Financial Officer, will be resigning from his role on October 27, 2025.

data.title: AES declares $0.17595/share quarterly dividend, payable on Nov 14, 2025 to shareholders of record on Oct 31, 2025.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, The AES Corporation announced a quarterly common stock dividend of $0.17595 per share for shareholders of record as of October 31, 2025. This dividend will be payable on November 14, 2025. The announcement was made by the Board of Directors of The AES Corporation, listed on the NYSE as AES.
BITCOIN LAST DOWN 5.5% AT $114505 AS OF 4:58 PM ET

data.title: Sprott Physical Platinum and Palladium Trust launches "At-the-Market" equity program to issue $250 million USD units in US and Canada.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Sprott Asset Management LP, a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., representing the Sprott Physical Platinum and Palladium Trust (NYSE: SPPP) (TSX: SPPP / SPPP.U), disclosed an expansion in its at-the-market equity program. The Trust, a closed-ended mutual fund trust focused on investing in physical platinum and palladium bullion, revealed its plan to issue up to U.S. $250 million worth of Units in the United States and Canada.

data.title: Bitcoin derivatives show caution despite strong BTC ETF inflows. Gold hits new highs and US-China tensions trigger market sell-off.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Bitcoin faced challenges in gaining traction, with traders exercising caution. Gold reached unprecedented highs, while escalating trade tensions between the US and China led to a significant downturn in the overall market.

data.title: BlackRock's profitable Bitcoin ETF leads, Coinbase enters NY staking market. S&P unveils new hybrid crypto index.
data.description: BlackRock's exchange-traded fund (ETF) focused on Bitcoin has emerged as the most profitable option in the market, outperforming other similar investments. Meanwhile, the popular cryptocurrency platform Coinbase has made a significant move by entering New York's staking market, expanding its offerings in the region. In addition to these developments, Standard & Poor's has introduced a new hybrid index that blends traditional assets with cryptocurrencies, reflecting the growing interest and integration of digital assets in the financial sector. These advancements highlight the increasing importance and influence of cryptocurrencies in the investment landscape.

data.title: Brookfield Corp (NYSE: BN, TSX: BN) will host Q3 2025 results conference call on Nov 13, at 9:00am ET.
data.description: Brookfield Corporation is scheduled to hold its Q3 2025 conference call and webcast on November 13, 2025, at 9:00 am (ET). The event will be accessible to shareholders and interested parties, with Brookfield's stock listed as BN on the NYSE and TSX exchanges.

data.title: Trump criticizes China for rare-earth export curbs. S&P 500 drops amid trade tensions. MP Stock sees surge.
data.description: China's export restrictions on rare earth minerals have drawn criticism from President Trump, who warned of imposing significant tariffs as a response. This move has caused global concern, as these rare earth minerals are crucial for various industries. Following Trump's statement, stock markets experienced a decline, with the S&P 500 slipping, while the MP stock surged. This development underscores the growing tension in international trade relations, with potential economic repercussions on a global scale.

data.title: Bitcoin miners possess a unique advantage for the AI industry, according to Bernstein. Iren is named a top pick. Shares reverse.
data.description: An analysis by Bernstein highlights that bitcoin miners possess a significant edge in the AI sector. The firm singled out Iren as a top choice in this regard. This information was shared in a recent report titled "Bitcoin Miners Have This AI Advantage, Analysts Say." Following this news, share prices experienced a reversal in trend as per Investor's Business Daily.
Venezuela warns UN Council it will self-defend if US attacks - UNSC Meeting

data.title: Sabrina Carpenter's fragrance line "Sweet Tooth" debuts at Ulta Beauty on Oct 10 with Bite Sized collection.
data.description: Sabrina Carpenter's beloved fragrance line, Sweet Tooth, will be available at Ulta Beauty starting on October 10th. The collection will feature the launch of Bite Sized, a new line of deluxe 10ml minis featuring Sabrina's signature scents. This release will take place in Los Angeles on October 10, 2025.
